prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-HEADWRAP-11496435-PRINCESS-AMZ Product Type: HAIR_TIE Brand (from catalog): Disney Existing Title: Disney Princess Purple Glitter Headband Hair Accessory Scrunchie Girls 3 and Up Description: If your little one is obsessed with Disney Princesses, this officially licensed Disney Princess hair bow headband is the perfect hair accessory. This super-cute glitter elastic hair band features some of everyone's favorite princesses - Belle, Tiana, and Ariel.

This full-sized elastic headband is easy to put on and take off, making it an ideal hair accessory for little kids just learning how to style their hair. The simple elastic band will eliminate the need for any painful and pesky hair clips and ties to help prevent hair damage.

The unique-style head wrap comes with a glittery pink elastic band attached to the purple bow, perfect for adding a little flair to any everyday outfit. The bow headband is safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision. These fun hair accessories also make great stocking stuffers and party favor gifts for Disney-themed birthday parties. Search Terms: girls hair accessories girls headbands girls bandanas multiuse bandanas girls face coverings girls cold weather gear winter gear for girls pink hair bandanas girls hair ties disney gifts for girls princesses stocking stuffers for girls Features: - DISNEY PRINCESS HAIR ACCESSORY - Officially licensed Disney Princess headband features a large purple bow with some of everyone's favorite princesses - Belle, Tiana, and Ariel - FULL-SIZED ELASTIC HEADBAND - Easy to use stretchy headband ideal hair accecssory for little kids just learning how to style hair; Eliminates the need for pesky hair clips and snaps that can cause hair damage - VERSATILE FASHION ACCESSORY - Glittery pink elastic band with a purple bow can be wrapped to add fun flair to any outfit; Great stocking stuffer or party favor for Disney-themed parties - SAFE FOR KIDS - Headband and bow is safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision: Choking hazard (small parts) - SPECIFICATIONS - Officially licensed (Disney Princess); Size: one size fits most; Colors; purple, pink; Age recommendation: 3+ years === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Disney Princess Purple Glitter Headband Hair Accessory

openai.item_name: Disney Purple Glitter Princess Headband Hair Accessory

anthropic.title_differentiation: Officially Licensed, Full-Sized Elastic Headband, Belle Tiana Ariel, Ages 3 And Up, Stretchy Hair Tie

openai.title_differentiation: Glitter Bow, Stretch Elastic Fit, Belle Tiana And Ariel Design, Ages 3 Plus, Party Favor Gift For Kids
